attributes.action: Reverse  the decision of ceding the Chagos Islands.
attributes.additional_details: I feel this is a foolish and mindless decision which will harm the UK and the Chagosians. It comes at great cost and zero benefit. The decision should be examined for corruption and Misconduct in public office
attributes.background: Consideration of the dangers / benefits / costs of ceding control of the Chagos islands to be examined and to consider opinions of all affected parties including Chagosians, British armed forces, British public and diago Garcia naval base users.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Stop the Chagos Deal
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/730757
